description: Unified evidence bundle aggregating differential test harnesses from G04, G05, G08, and G09 gate completions. The suite fails closed until the G04 slash-command differential runner executes both Rust Pi and pi-mono.

component_evidence.description: Slash command differential coverage is not certified: the harness now preflights the Rust Pi and pi-mono RPC entrypoints and maps RPC-observable slash behavior, but the pinned legacy runtime is not runnable because node_modules/tsx is absent.
evidence_artifacts: tests/dropin_slash_differential.rs asserts that synthetic differential success is forbidden until every scenario reports real mirrored pass evidence
tests/dropin_slash_differential/mod.rs preflights CARGO_BIN_EXE_pi plus legacy pi-mono RPC paths and returns blocked with DIFFERENTIAL_RUNNER_UNAVAILABLE when the legacy tsx runtime is absent
RPC-observable slash scenarios are mapped to JSONL RPC commands; non-RPC-observable UI-only commands remain fail-closed until an adapter exists
Comprehensive CLI edge case coverage (tests/cli_edge_cases.rs) is supporting coverage only, not differential parity evidence

component_evidence.description: RPC command semantics and event stream differential testing with 96.6% success rate
Session JSONL schema and hostcall error taxonomy parity verification
Tool stdio, process lifecycle, file/search I/O, and streaming behavior parity
evidence_artifacts: 41 tool scenarios across 5 surfaces (bash, file, search, streaming, truncation)

surfaces_covered: CLI slash commands (fail-closed: legacy RPC runtime unavailable and some UI-only commands are not RPC-observable)

acceptance_evidence.criterion: All four differential gate evidence bundles present and valid
acceptance_evidence.evidence: G04 slash_command_differential is present but explicitly fail-closed until the Rust Pi/pi-mono runner executes every slash scenario successfully

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Differential test harnesses cover critical interaction surfaces
acceptance_evidence.evidence: CLI slash-command scenarios return blocked DIFFERENTIAL_RUNNER_UNAVAILABLE in this environment because the pinned legacy tsx runtime is absent; unsupported UI-only slash commands are also fail-closed

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Canonicalization rules documented for cross-platform stability
acceptance_evidence.evidence: 15+ canonicalization rules documented across timing, PIDs, paths, and event boundaries
G10 remains blocked by gap-cli-slash-command-surface until slash_command_differential reports real mirrored execution
